code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut token = ""
mut seen = "\n"
mut count = 0

while i < n
  let opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  match opt
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        let key = "\n#{token}\n"
        if not string.contains(seen, key)
          seen = "#{seen}#{token}\n"
          count = count + 1
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    token = token
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(token)
  let key = "\n#{token}\n"
  if not string.contains(seen, key)
    count = count + 1
  end
end

println("unique=#{count}")
